expires_today.title: Ultimate Environment & World Building Collection
expires_today.long_description:
Gorgeous and easy to implement scenery options have arrived within one curated bundle. Add unmatched realism and polish to your next development cycle with ready-to-use environmental assets designed to save you time and money! Fill your games with lost shrines, Asian terraces, medieval fantasy villages, modular Viking village kits, and so much more—all with FAB Professional License Keys! Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your next big fantasy or sci-fi game to life and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 11th, 2027.

expires_today.title: Programming with AI and GPT Prompts by Mammoth
expires_today.long_description:
Learn how to work smarter, not harder with the all-new Programming with AI and GPT Prompts Bundle! Feed your digital curiosity about AI and GPT with professional-led courses like 101 OpenClaw Prompts - Automate with AI, 101 AI Agent Skills - Automate with OpenClaw, 101 Claude Design Projects - Automate with AI Prompts, and more! Additional courses within this amazing bundle will help you better understand AI so you can leverage new opportunities to create efficiencies and even save money! Pay what you want for the very best from Mammoth Club and help support Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 11th, 2027

expires_today.title: Double Shift: Simulation Bundle
expires_today.long_description:
Love simulator games but feel like you’ve exhausted all your options? We guarantee you’ll find something to love in this bundle of sim games of all types! Take on the rustic country living in the near-endless open world of Farmer’s Life! Build your own hype house and influence your way to fame and fortune in Youtubers Life and Youtubers Life 2! Tune up your dream cars and hit the streets in the racing sim game Underground Garage! There’s so much more to explore and enjoy in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, and choose which charity to support with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 10th, 2027

expires_today.title: Perplexing Puzzles
expires_today.long_description:
Flex your puzzle-solving skills and bend your brain into new shapes with this bundle of the best puzzle games! Challenge your sense of reality and jump inside the instant camera photos you take in Viewfinder! Solve logic puzzles to progress through a mysterious world full of secrets in Taiji! Work as a team and solve both halves of a puzzle to escape a deadly experiment in two-player co-op Parallel Experiment! There are even more exciting puzzle games to lose yourself inside in this bundle, so don’t get stumped—grab it now at the price of your choice, and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Viewfinder before December 10th, 2026. All other titles before June 10th, 2027.

expires_today.title: The Best of Robert Silverberg by Open Road Media
expires_today.long_description: Feel like you’ve read all the new sci-fi and fantasy books and looking for something a little more classic? We’ve got a bundle full of the best novels and stories by celebrated author Robert Silverberg! Dive into his Majipoor Cycle with Lord Valentine’s Castle, following an amnesiac juggler who finds out he’s the heir to an entire planet, or start with the prequel trilogy launched by Sorcerers of Majipoor, and learn how the throne became so contested in the first place. Meet the new inheritors of the Earth in At Winter’s End, a tribe of humanoids who emerge from their hibernation after an apocalypse. Or keep things short and sweet with the novella Nightwings, set on an unfamiliar Earth facing alien invasion. There are many more worlds, futures, and adventures to explore in this ebook bundle of Silverberg’s work, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support the ALA’s Freedom to Read Foundation with your purchase!

expires_today.title: Build, Shuffle, Battle!
expires_today.long_description:
Build, shuffle, and battle throughout an all-star collection of inventive deckbuilders! Get tactical in Wildfrost, a roguelike deckbuilder where you’ll fight to collect cards strong enough to defrost an eternal winter! Uncover the mysteries of BOOK OF HOURS, a narrative RPG with deckbuilding elements set in a fictional 1930s world filled with hidden gods. Shuffle new games into your personal collection for a price you choose, and help support the TD Foundation with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027

expires_today.title: Humble 15th Anniversary - Indie Icons Showcase
expires_today.description: An anniversary present from us to you!
expires_today.long_description:
Happy Anniversary to us! We’re celebrating 15 years of Humble Bundle with another extra-special bundle of our favorite indie games! Guide a cursed orphan through a demon-infested castle before your body turns to crystal in Castlevania’s spiritual successor Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night! Play an upgraded spin on an old favorite in iconic roguelike Risk of Rain Returns, where the passenger of a crashed freighter must survive on an alien planet of monsters! Climb a haunted mountain and defeat nightmares, panic, and self-doubt in Celeste! There are even more great games in this bundle we’re sure you’ll love just as much as we do, so grab them now, and support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027.

expires_today.title: Adventurer's Audio Loot
expires_today.description: It’s adventure time with amazing audio
expires_today.long_description:
Dynamic sound design adds the next level of polish you’ve been searching for—unlock ultra realistic sound effects to your next project’s epic battles with the Adventurer's Audio Loot Bundle! Make your players feel every punch and kick land with the Combat - High Intensity Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Capture the echoes and creepy crawlers of the dark with the Dungeon Exploration Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Or satisfy that itch to hear the perfect menu navigation sounds with the Menu/UI Audio Pack, Vol. 1. Pay what you want for a curated collection of A+ audio assets and help support the ESA Foundation with your purchase.

Please Note: Generative AI tools were utilized in the creation of the audio assets included in this bundle.

expires_tomorrow.title: Ultimate AI Skills Bundle
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Don’t let the AI revolution pass you by—pay what you want for the Ultimate AI Skills Bundle and begin your learning journey today. Explore the ins and outs of ChatGPT with ChatGPT Course: Master AI for Work & Creativity, start selling your own AI imagery with Midjourney Course: Create & Monetize AI Art, master Adobe’s flagship AI tools with Adobe Firefly Course: AI-Powered Design, Illustration & Photography Tools, and more! Get the advice and knowledge you seek from expert-led courses, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Warhammer Skulls 2026 Bundle
expires_tomorrow.description: Celebrate ten years of Warhammer Skulls
expires_tomorrow.long_description:
If you’re one of the lucky Space Marines gearing up for this year’s Warhammer Skulls festival—the tenth annual celebration!—we have a real treat for you. Build out your Warhammer 40,000 library with a bundle of strategy, shooter, and RPG games that will make the 41st millennium feel closer than ever! Build up your army and evolve your weapons arsenal in Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector! Brave the hordes of the Caligari Sector and carry out the Emperor’s will in Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr! Join the Ork forces and master the skies in Warhammer 40,000: Dakka Squadron - Flyboyz Edition! There’s even more fun to be had in this seven-game bundle, so grab it now before your enemies can take it, and support Comic Relief with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 5th, 2027.

expires_within_72h.title: 4X: Xplore, Xpand, Xploit, Xterminate
expires_within_72h.description: Your rise to greatness will be documented
expires_within_72h.long_description:
Explore dynamic maps, expand your territory, exploit the environment for resources, and exterminate anything that interferes with a massive collection of 4X games! Lead armies and rise to greatness in Songs of Silence, a visually stunning adventure filled with intense battles and captivating stories, build an unrivaled empire and flex your galactic greatness in pure 64-bit awesomeness with Distant Worlds 2, and more! Pay what you want for epic 4X fun and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

expires_within_72h.title: The Claude Code Mastery Bundle by Zenva
expires_within_72h.long_description: Develop software faster and learn the AI workflows modern developers are rapidly adopting with The Claude Code Mastery Bundle. Build full-stack AI apps with Next.js and Python, integrate Stripe subscriptions and modern LLM APIs, automate workflows with MCP and GitHub, and learn how to run fully private local AI systems with Ollama and OpenCode—all in one amazing bundle! Pay what you want for a masterclass collection from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building skills that can immediately improve how you develop software.

expires_within_72h.title: Infinite Dread: Horror Comics by Oni Press
expires_within_72h.long_description: Superheroes are all well and good, but oftentimes horror is where comics really shine. To bring you the spookiest stories the medium has to offer, we’ve teamed up with Oni Press for a selection of comics that are sure to keep you up at night! Something horrifically weird is going on and no one will talk about it in Hobtown Mystery Stories. A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!
